scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONT,SERVER,STORYBOOK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:storybook"
scripts.install:all: npm ci && cd frontend && npm ci
scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx dotenvx run --env-file ../.env -- uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.test:server: cd server && npx dotenvx run --env-file ../.env -- uv run pytest
scripts.lint:check:server: cd server && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix:server: cd server && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.format:check:server: cd server && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.format:fix:server: cd server && uv run ruff format .
scripts.migrate:db: cd server && npx dotenvx run --env-file ../.env -- alembic -n devdb upgrade head
scripts.status:db: cd server && npx dotenvx run --env-file ../.env -- alembic -n devdb current
scripts.rollback:db: cd server && npx dotenvx run --env-file ../.env -- alembic -n devdb downgrade -1
